entry.title: Unadulterated Loathing
entry.summary:
Author: 3mma_D1l3mma

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,145Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Clark Kent is trying to take down Lex Luthor and he needs information from Gothams Prince. Their relationship starts out very rocky, do not attack me pls I will try to update this sort of regularly as it is nowhere near finished.Ok bye

entry.title: congratulations, you adopted a spider!
entry.summary:
Author: maraudersmqry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 148,728Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 3,768

Summary: Peter was meant to be forgotten, he didn’t think that meant being dropped in Gotham. Or in his eight-year-old body, in the least. Or with vigilantes trying to adopt him!   IN WHICH, Dr. Strange gave Peter one last chance at a life, instead of being emo around the faces who no longer recognized him.

entry.title: Nothing beats a Jet Two Holiday. And right now, you can save 50 pounds per person, that's 200 pounds off for a family of four.
entry.summary:
Author: rosered27

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,673Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 264

Summary: "Please, Timmy.” Pulling him into his arms again, Tim didn’t protest it at all. “Just give us a chance to show you that we do, ‘kay? Please?” Tim sunk into Dick's hug. Sad, hurting, a part of him upset with his parents, and very hesitant. “...I dunno if I can.” “Then promise you’ll try? Can you do that?” “....Okay.” He whispered, breath stuttering. “...I’ll try.” or; Tim hasn't had anyone to rely on, and he'd never planned on that being the case... Maybe he should give it a try? (!!! THIS IS PART OF A SERIES, NOT MEANT TO BE READ BY ITSELF !! A.K.A. READ THE ONES BEFORE THIS.!)

entry.title: The Gravity of Small Things
entry.summary:
Author: Yevgeny

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,449Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Clark Kent has spent his entire college career becoming impossible to notice. Bruce Wayne has spent his becoming impossible to know. By all reasonable calculations, they should have stayed strangers—two people on a campus of twenty-eight thousand, each too committed to their own disappearing act to stumble into anyone else's. Reasonable calculations, as it turns out, do not account for assigned seating, a shared diner booth at eleven p.m., or the oldest rule in physics: that two things with enough mass, brought close enough together, will always—eventually, without fail—begin to pull.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: All The Things We Cannot See
entry.summary:
Author: Ivasa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,192Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: People disappear in Gotham every day.It is Batman’s job to find them.His job becomes significantly harder when Matches Malone keeps getting interrupted in his investigation by a very persistent rookie reporter from Metropolis.A reporter who keeps showing up exactly where he shouldn’t be.Seriously - how does this kid keep finding him?

entry.title: [Podfic] ship-to-ship combat
entry.summary:
Author: DevilWithABirdDress

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 198Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 51

Summary: Clark, in an attempt to make some spare cash, unintentionally stumbles into the world of superhero fanfiction, becomes a prolific writer for Gotham's OTP, and tries his best to fend off rival fans who want him to convert to superbat instead.Podfic of ship-to-ship combat by pomeloquat.

entry.title: Sanatorium
entry.summary:
Author: riversiders

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,076Chapters: 6/20Kudos: 83

Summary: They're forcing Bruce to rest. Tucked away on the Kents' farm in rural Kansas with Superman as his keeper, he has little choice but to cooperate. At least Dick is happy—happier. It's good for him to be around normal, well-adjusted people. They can be there for him in ways Bruce is incapable of. The more he reads of his mother's journal, the more certain he becomes; Bruce Wayne was never destined to be part of a happy family. Meanwhile, back in Gotham, the Batclub's hard at work. It'll be a dirty job, bringing Thomas Elliot to justice. Luckily, Lois, Harvey, and Selina are perfectly comfortable with the morally grey.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Do You Wanna Change It?
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,207Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: The goal was simple: Evade Kal's detection for two hours; that was all. Without his armour or utility belt, Bruce Wayne is stripped of every advantage, reduced to nothing more than another man, fleeing from a predator. But this is no ordinary hunt, with an ordinary man. If Kal-El is to catch him, he knows he'll be entirely at the Kryptonian's mercy. *Can be read standalone*

entry.title: Nolan’s Dark Knight v the Man of Steel
entry.summary:
Author: legobiwan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,837Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Three years after the battle with Bane a tragedy accuses on the invasion of Zod which draws Bruce Wayne to return to Gotham along with Alfred and Robin (John Blake). Batman starts planning to capture Superman for his part in the Metropolis destruction, no matter how dark his methods are getting, but Lex Luthor partners with the Joker in their plan to turn The Dark Knight against The Man Of Steel.

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 108,539Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 561

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Nox Est
entry.summary:
Author: I_N_G_S_O_C

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,526Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Corruption is uncovered at WE, and Bruce Wayne is suddenly in a lot of trouble with the media and the people.A certain reporter is giving him a rough time, prying, prodding and digging deep into his personal life and his company's records and finances, desperately trying to catch Bruce Wayne slipping.At the same time, measly thugs get the better of Batman and he stands before an issue he can't just solve with a snap of his fingers. So in a desperate attempt to get out of the mess, Batman allies with Superman to track down the criminals. OR Batman is in a world of problems and Superman both helps to solve and worsens said problems.

entry.title: Falling Coin
entry.summary:
Author: VillianEater

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,171Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 15

Summary: A Wayne's path was written long before they could walk it. Born to power, bound to legacy. Gotham was a burning pit of violence and crime, so of course, as Bryce Wayne tried to hang up the cowl, she failed. Terribly so. Now everything was ruined. The face of the man she was about to marry had melted halfway off his skull, things between her and the Man of Steel were uncertain after the night they shared and the city she called her home did everything to bring her to her knees. But Bryce was a Wayne and she would make Gotham bend to her will or die trying. Or: What if Batman was a woman and she and Superman had a thing for each other?

entry.title: the whole world was here, waiting
entry.summary:
Author: Neery

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,427Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 281

Summary: In another universe, a much darker version of Batman has been holding Superman captive for a year. In this one, Bruce was only planning to neutralize an interdimensional threat. He didn’t plan on a rescue mission. He didn’t plan to take home a hurt, broken captive who may or may not be a version of the Clark Kent he knows. But now that he has, he needs to figure out what to do with him without putting the whole planet at risk. It takes Clark a while to realize he hasn’t just traded one abuser for another, more dangerous one.

entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,478Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 102

Summary: On a cruise ship, Clark Kent's Kryptonian biology recognizes something in Bruce Wayne that even Bruce doesn't see: kor'va—soul recognition. The moment one consciousness knows another will change everything. Three years later, they undergo ra'sh'mora, the ancient Kryptonian bonding ritual. It's not marriage. It's a permanent quantum entanglement of two nervous systems. Clark feels Bruce constantly—his heartbeat, his emotions, his presence. They are never alone again. Then Bruce's heart starts failing.

  • Emotional Hurt/Comfort
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Therapy

entry.title: How to Lose Your Virginity (And Accidentally Fall in Love)
entry.summary:
Author: breathbetween

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,643Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 235

Summary: Bruce let out a deep, tired sigh and rubbed at his temple with his glove. “Speak,” he grunted. “You- you mean that-” Clark took a sharp breath, his voice coming out thin, like air slipping from a deflating balloon. “You’re also a virgin?!” Bruce regretted engaging in this conversation instantly. It could have been such a peaceful night.  or whereBatman doesn’t do relationships. Superman is afraid he might hurt someone if he tries. So they come up with a solution. Because what could possibly go wrong with losing your virginity to your best friend? Right?
